values: Being slow can cause you to struggle to keep up with the team
Not being fit can cause you to miss out on the deep, transformative experience designed by Indiahikes

evidence.quote_or_summary: You struggle to be a part of the team because you’re slow.
You miss out on a deep, transformative experience that Indiahikes specially designs for you.

values: Walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes (minimum recommended fitness level)

evidence.quote_or_summary: To do the Rupin Pass Trek comfortably, you must be able to walk, jog or run 5 km in under 32 minutes. This is the minimum recommended fitness level that you must aim for.

values: Fitness approval from the Indiahikes team is required 20 days before the trek date; without it you will not be allowed on the trek
Only running, jogging or walking are accepted as fitness proofs; cross-training workouts will not be considered valid
At least 3 runs from the last 1 month must meet the fitness criteria
Record runs using apps like Nike or Strava and paste your public profile link on your Indiahikes account
Fitness record may be rejected if you fail to link your fitness profile or do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

evidence.quote_or_summary: Every trekker needs fitness approval from the Indiahikes team 20 days before the trek date. Without this, you will not be allowed on the trek.
We accept only running, jogging or walking as fitness proofs. Cross-training workouts will not be considered valid.
So make sure to record at least 3 runs from the last 1 month to meet the fitness criteria of the trek.
Use fitness tracking apps such as Strava, Nike Run Club, or similar to log your runs and workouts. Paste your profile's link on your Indiahikes account (your profile has to be public).
If you fail to link your fitness profile; If you do not meet the required fitness level at least three times in the past month

values: 6 to 8 weeks before the trek begins
6-week plan available for those not currently active

evidence.quote_or_summary: All you need to do is start following the fitness routine 6 to 8 weeks before your trek begins.
If you are not currently active, follow the below schedule to get trek fit in 6 weeks!

values: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records; parents must ensure children remain physically active and prepared

evidence.quote_or_summary: Children below 14 years are not required to submit fitness records. However, parents must ensure that children remain physically active and prepared for the trek.
